name: @com-junkawasaki/svgraph
description: Browser-only SVGraph editor and SVG to PresentationML/PPTX converter.

scripts.check:package: node -e "import('./docs/app.js').then((m) => { for (const name of ['buildSVGraph','buildSVGraphSidecar','svgToDrawingMl','drawingMlToSvg','svgToPptx','initSVGraphEditor','assistantPatchProposal','buildSVGraphAssistantPrompt','parseAssistantPatchProposal','validateAssistantPatch','assistantPatchDiff','applyAssistantPatch']) if (typeof m[name] !== 'function') throw new Error(name); if (!Array.isArray(m.assistantAllowedOps)) throw new Error('assistantAllowedOps'); })" && mkdir -p tmp && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs --version && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs svg2dml examples/sample.svg > tmp/package-smoke.xml && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs dml2svg tmp/package-smoke.xml > tmp/package-smoke.svg && node ./bin/svgraph.mjs svgraph examples/sample.svg > tmp/package-svgraph.json
